message:
refactor(codegen): Add auto-closing helpers to for_special.zig and random_mod.zig

- Add emitConst, emitFmtConst, emitIndent, emitIndentFmt, emitIndentWithIdent,
  emitIndentWithIdentFmt helpers to for_special.zig
- Add emitConst, emitFmtConst helpers to random_mod.zig
- Refactor genEnumerateLoop and genZipLoop to use new helpers
- Refactor genRandom, genUniform, genGauss, genExpovariate, genRandbits,
  genRandrange, genChoice, genChoices, genShuffle, genSample, genGammavariate,
  genBetavariate, genParetovariate, genWeibullvariate, genTriangular,
  genLognormvariate, genVonmises to use new helpers
- ~200 lines of boilerplate removed across both files
